Name: System Monitor
Description: Live CPU & memory graphs (Windows 10 Task Manager style) across a row of keys.

Actions.Name: System Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Live CPU/RAM graph — place across a row of keys

Localization.SysmonHint: Place this action on a block of keys — any rectangle: a row, a column, or e.g. 3×3. All keys with the same Metric join into ONE graph that grows wider AND taller as you add keys. To show both at once, set one block to CPU and another block to Memory. Use the same settings on every key of a block.
